name: hud_ui_background_constructor
description: HudUiBackground::Constructor initializes the background container, cursor widget, child widget arrays, sound slots, font/text-panel state, and VMode-derived UI origin.
known_limits: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob1 /GX /Zp4 COFF byte compare fails with 341 unmasked mismatches after relocation masking; Binary Ninja body is 426 bytes and the VC object body is 336 bytes.

Reviewed drift is dominated by the retail VC EH registration frame and MSVC_EH_ArrayConstructor calls for the HudUiWidget, HudUiBackgroundVideoWidget, HudFontStyle, and HudUiTransitionTextPanel member arrays; the current source emits explicit constructor loops.

The native smoke covers container/cursor ftable installation, cursor capture defaults, array endpoint initialization, sound slot defaults, font/text-panel defaults, null clip/root fields under zero-initialized storage, and VMode 6 origin selection.
